scripts.test: cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require src/steps/**/*.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --format progress-bar --format json:reports/cucumber.json
scripts.test:report: cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require src/steps/**/*.ts --require src/hooks/**/*.ts --format json:reports/cucumber.json && npx cucumber-html-reporter --source reports/cucumber.json --output reports/cucumber-report.html --theme bootstrap
